benefits.description: Mood lift experienced from BPC-157, particularly oral administration putting them in a really good mood

side_effects.description: Opposite mood effect (negative) also experienced from BPC-157; possibly negative effect after initial good mood from oral administration
GHK-Cu makes them a little lethargic

protocol_notes: User has taken BPC-157 both orally and by injection; oral noted for mood and gut-brain axis effects. GHK-Cu caused lethargy. Mentions injections considered better for skin benefits.
